# Improve notification/toast accessibility

Toasts may not be announced or are hard to dismiss.

## Task
- Find notification UI implementation (frontend + backend payloads).
- Ensure proper ARIA roles (`role="status"` or `aria-live`).
- Ensure close button is keyboard accessible.

## Acceptance criteria
- Screen readers announce notifications.
- Keyboard-only users can interact with toasts.

Labels: ssoc26, medium, accessibility
